summary: Gate O reviewed the API provider activation proposal and passed. The only authorized next work is no-network provider contract preflight; no real provider call, credential value read/storage, subscription CLI daemonization, deploy, PR, external repo, Web, IDE, or production work is authorized.
recommendation_for_human: Proceed to Phase 10 provider contract preflight. Human provider, credential, model policy, and single paid-smoke budget decisions remain required before any real API call.
notes: Gate O authorizes contract preflight only.
Real API calls remain blocked until a later human-approved gate.
